# LM7805CT — Absolute Maximum Ratings

Input voltage: 35 V
Junction temperature: -40 to 125 °C
Storage temperature: -65 to 150 °C
Power dissipation: Internally limited (thermal shutdown)
Output current: Internally limited (short circuit protection)

# LM7805CT — Recommended Operating Conditions

Input voltage: 7 to 25 V
Output voltage: 4.8 to 5.2 V (typical: 5.0 V)
Output current: up to 1.5 A (with adequate heatsink)
Dropout voltage: 2 V (minimum input-output differential)
Line regulation: 0.01%/V typical
Load regulation: 0.1% typical
Quiescent current: 5 mA typical
Ripple rejection: 80 dB typical

# LM7805CT — Pin Description

Pin 1 (Input): Unregulated voltage input
Pin 2 (Ground): Common ground reference
Pin 3 (Output): Regulated 5.0 V output

# LM7805CT — Power Requirements

Thermal resistance (TO-220):

- Junction-to-case: 5 °C/W
- Junction-to-ambient: 65 °C/W (no heatsink)
- With heatsink: depends on heatsink rating

Power dissipation = (Vin - Vout) × Iout
Example: Vin=12V, Vout=5V, Iout=500mA → PD=3.5W
Temperature rise without heatsink: 3.5W × 65°C/W = 227.5°C (EXCEEDS MAX!)
Must use heatsink for any significant load.

Thermal shutdown: Activates at ~150°C junction
Current limiting: Activates at ~2.1 A output

# LM7805CT — Application Note

Input capacitor: 0.33 µF ceramic required if regulator is more than 4 inches from filter cap
Output capacitor: 0.1 µF ceramic required for stability
Higher output capacitance (up to 10 µF) improves transient response

Reverse voltage protection:

- Add a reverse-biased diode from output to input if output can be driven above input
- Or add a protection diode at the input

For higher current applications:

- Use external pass transistor (see datasheet application circuit)
- Ensure adequate heatsinking
- Consider switching regulator alternatives for lower dropout and higher efficiency

# LM7805CT — Package Outline

Package: TO-220 (3 lead)
Lead pitch: 2.54 mm
Tab: Electrically connected to pin 2 (GND)
Body dimensions: 14.9 x 10.2 mm
Mounting: Through-hole, tab mounted to heatsink

Footprint:

- Pad size: 1.5 x 1.5 mm (each lead)
- Pad pitch: 2.54 mm
- Tab pad: varies by heatsink mounting
